verifier: V3 metric redesign — V3_v2 mirror-SMA-preserving permutation test + spec inconsistency discovery
purpose: raw#9 hexa-only ω-cycle. §9.3 V3 FALSIFIED critical blocker resolution attempt. Surface finding: V3 spec PAIRS↔PRESERVE_PERM partial mismatch.

results_BASE_p1.direction_anomaly: DESTRUCT_PERM yields HIGHER SMA than PRESERVE_PERM in both reductions — opposite of spec intent.

spec_inconsistency_discovery.issue: V3 spec PAIRS and PRESERVE_PERM are inconsistent on positions [3,4,5]
spec_inconsistency_discovery.consequence: PRESERVE_PERM only preserves the first 3 pairs (0,6),(1,7),(2,8). The last 3 pairs (3,10),(4,11),(5,9) get mapped to (3,11),(4,9),(5,10) — different H values, breaking the 'preserve' guarantee for half of PAIRS.
spec_inconsistency_discovery.evidence: Selftest on random Gaussian H also fails the strict-preservation assertion (SMA_preserve=0.060 vs baseline=0.106). The mismatch is substrate-level, not data-dependent.

implication_for_V3_original: §9.3 V3 (Gram Frob ratio) FALSIFIED 결과 'preserve_perm이 destruct보다 더 큰 disturbance' phenomenon은 metric bug + spec mismatch 중첩. 단순 metric 교체로 해결 안 됨 — PRESERVE_PERM 또는 PAIRS 한 쪽 fix 필요.
implication_for_4tuple_PASS_blocker: §11에서 V3 metric bug만 blocker로 보였으나 본 cycle은 'V3 spec PAIRS↔PRESERVE_PERM mismatch'까지 추가 blocker로 노출. Mk.IX/Mk.X 모든 path는 spec fix 후에야 V3 lift 시도 가능.

spec_fix_candidates_raw12_new_revision.side_effects: V2 SMA 도구 영향. BASE 재측정 필요. V2 lasttoken+PAPO 결과(+0.164) 재해석 필요.
spec_fix_candidates_raw12_new_revision.risk: 기존 V2 PASS 후보 결과 무효화

spec_fix_candidates_raw12_new_revision.side_effects: V3 original 도구 영향. CPS 재측정 필요. V3 FALSIFIED verdict 재검증.

spec_fix_candidates_raw12_new_revision.description: 기존 V3/V2 frozen specs 모두 보존 + 새 axis (V3_v3 or V4) 별도 등록. 새 metric은 'paired vs random distractor cosine ratio' (no permutation, direct semantic). 4-tuple → 5-tuple scope expansion.
spec_fix_candidates_raw12_new_revision.side_effects: spec scope 확장 (V0+V1+V2+V3 + V_new). raw#12 new revision으로 등록.
spec_fix_candidates_raw12_new_revision.risk: scope 증가로 PASS bar 더 높아짐. weakest-evidence-link 원칙으로 V3 archive 가능.

saturation_finding: V3 metric redesign은 단순 metric 교체로 해결 안 됨. 더 깊은 spec inconsistency (PAIRS ↔ PRESERVE_PERM)가 substrate-level로 노출됨. 다음 cycle saturation point는 spec fix decision (Option A/B/C 중 하나) + 새 verifier registration — substrate measurement는 spec consistency 후 의미 있음.
decision_priority_post_cycle: P1: spec consistency resolution — Option C (new verifier 5-tuple expansion) 권장, raw#12 new revision
P3: V2 multi-axis PAPO extension (+0.036 gap close, BASE-substrate, $0)
P4: Mk.X T10-13 G1-G4 gate fire criteria pre-register (gating spec only, $0)
P5: Mk.X G1-G4 fire + atom generation (GPU 비용 큼, raw#9 exempt)

raw_compliance.raw_10_no_overclaim: satisfied — V3_v2 verdict FAIL 정직 보고, anomaly direction 명시, spec inconsistency 별도 finding으로 분리 (metric verdict와 분리)
raw_compliance.raw_12_cherry_pick_proof: satisfied — V3_v2 PASS predicate 사전 등록, post-hoc 변경 없음. spec fix decision은 별도 raw#12 new revision으로
